summary: Full backend + frontend testing of GDPR Phase 1/2/3/5 auth extension (terms/privacy/marketing consent, email verification, cookie banner, admin filters). 18/18 backend pytests PASS. Frontend register page renders 3 consent checkboxes with correct data-testids, marketing default-unchecked, submit disabled→enabled correctly. Cookie banner displays with 3 buttons. /verify-email page renders error state correctly. Admin Users page shows 3 new columns (✉/📱/📣) and 3 new filter dropdowns (visible Email/Telefon/Marketing toți), but dropdowns LACK expected data-testid attributes. Login regression PASS for all 3 seeded accounts. EmailVerificationBanner correctly absent for grandfathered users. Backfill confirmed in DB for all 3 seeded users.
action_items: Add data-testid attributes to AdminUsers filter dropdowns: data-testid='filter-email-verified', data-testid='filter-phone-verified', data-testid='filter-marketing-consent' on the three new <select> elements next to the existing role/CSV controls in AdminUsers.jsx. Currently they render with visible labels (Email: toți / Telefon: toți / Marketing: toți) but missing testids — filters work functionally but cannot be auto-targeted in Playwright.
critical_code_review_comments: auth.py is 1540 lines — exceeds 700-line guideline. Should be split (e.g., split out 2FA, OAuth, GDPR, support inbox into separate routers).

Resend-verification rate limit uses in-memory _resend_attempts dict — will reset on restart and won't work across multiple backend replicas. Recommend persisting last attempt timestamp in DB (user.email_verification_last_sent_at) for production durability.
verify-email endpoint catches ValueError silently when parsing expires (line 1503) — corrupt timestamps will allow expired tokens through. Consider explicit logging.

POST /cookies/consent calls get_current_user(request) inside try/except (line 1469) — this is fragile because get_current_user signature expects FastAPI dependency, not direct call. Works because of internal cookie parsing, but brittle. Prefer Optional[dict] = Depends(get_current_user_optional).
seed_data_creation: Created multiple TEST_ phasetest_* / consupd_* / verifytest_* / resend_* / cook_* users via /api/auth/register in tests. Use 'Curăță userii de test' admin button to clean up.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend GDPR auth extension is fully working — all 18 pytests pass on /app/backend/tests/test_phase_gdpr_auth_extension.py. Frontend: register consents, cookie banner, verify-email page, admin users page all render correctly. Only minor gap: AdminUsers filter <select> elements need data-testid='filter-email-verified|phone-verified|marketing-consent' for future Playwright automation. EmailVerificationBanner integration verified-absent for grandfathered users (correct behavior).
verified_flows: POST /api/auth/register WITHOUT terms_accepted=true → 400 with Romanian 'Termenii și Condițiile' message ✅
POST /api/auth/register WITHOUT privacy_policy_accepted=true → 400 with 'Politica de Confidențialitate' ✅

POST /api/auth/register with full consent → 200, response includes terms/privacy/marketing flags + email_verified=false + phone_verified=false; 3 consent_audit_log entries inserted (source=register) ✅
GET /api/auth/verify-email with valid token → 200 {ok:true, verified:true}; 2nd call → 404 (token cleared) ✅
PATCH /api/me/consent {marketing_consent:false} → 200, DB updated, audit log source=settings ✅
POST /api/cookies/consent (anonymous + authenticated variants) → 200; authenticated case updates user.functional/analytics/marketing_cookies_accepted ✅
Backfill: admin/client/specialist@propmanage.io have email_verified=true, terms_accepted=true, privacy_policy_accepted=true, consent_grandfathered=true ✅
Login regression: all 3 seeded accounts can still login + /me works ✅
Frontend /register: 3 consent checkboxes with consent-terms/consent-privacy/consent-marketing testids; marketing unchecked by default; submit disabled until terms+privacy both checked ✅
Frontend CookieBanner: data-testid='cookie-banner' at bottom with cookie-accept-all / cookie-reject-optional / cookie-customize buttons ✅
Frontend /verify-email?token=invalid: renders 'Verificare eșuată / Token invalid sau expirat' with 'Înapoi la login →' link ✅
Frontend Admin → Toți userii: 3 new columns ✉ 📱 📣 + 3 new filter dropdowns visible (Email: toți / Telefon: toți / Marketing: toți) ✅
Frontend EmailVerificationBanner correctly NOT shown for grandfathered client@propmanage.io (email_verified=true) ✅
